title: spermacoce capitata var. normalis
intro: Spermacoce capitata var. normalis, also known as the Yellow Bitter Buttons, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of the world. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Spermacoce capitata var. normalis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
